user.title: Connect to Kubernetes Cluster
user.description: Configure access to your Kubernetes cluster running FluxCD

data_description.access_mode: Select 'In-Cluster' if Home Assistant runs inside Kubernetes, or 'Kubeconfig File' for external access
data_description.kubeconfig_path: Path to the kubeconfig file (leave empty for default location, only used with Kubeconfig mode)
data_description.namespace: Kubernetes namespace to monitor (leave empty for all namespaces)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll FluxCD resources (in seconds, minimum 10)
data_description.label_selector: Optional Kubernetes label selector to filter resources (e.g. 'app=myapp')

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Kubernetes cluster. Please check your configuration.
error.invalid_kubeconfig_path: The specified kubeconfig file does not exist.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs for more details.

abort.already_configured: This cluster and namespace combination is already configured.
